nodes.name: Meek's lorikeet
nodes.summary: Meek's lorikeet（Vini meeki）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Meek's lorikeet。

nodes.name: Meek's lorikeet
nodes.summary: Meek's lorikeet (Vini meeki) is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae. It is found on Bougainville Island in Papua New Guinea and the Solomon Islands. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. It is threatened by habitat loss. Taxonomy This species was formerly assigned to the genus Charmosyna. It was moved to the genus Vini based on a molecular phylogenetic study of the lorikeets published in 2020. References

nodes.name: Vini
nodes.summary: Vini（Vini）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Duchess lorikeet、Meek's lorikeet、Red-chinned lorikeet等10种鸟类。
